# /session-start (preview)

This file is an **abbreviated placeholder**. A real project receives the full command from `templates/commands/session-start.md` under `.claude/commands/session-start.md`.

**After init-project, commands live at:** `.claude/commands/*.md`

**Typical flow:** read `CLAUDE.md`, `.claude/session-state.md`, run hooks / preflight as documented in the full template, then present salience-ordered context to the operator.

See the OS repo: `templates/commands/session-start.md` for the complete procedure.
